name: Par28
about: Par28 is a multi-activity venue featuring indoor golf simulators and axe throwing, complemented by a full-service restaurant and bar. The facility utilizes TrackMan technology across seven bays, providing a premium golf simulation experience with over 200 courses to choose from. Pricing is structured by bay hour, with varying rates for early bird, off-peak, and peak times, and includes an option for club rentals. The venue is designed to accommodate a wide range of activities, from individual practice and leagues to corporate events and casual outings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for realistic ball and club tracking
Extensive library of over 200 world-famous golf courses
Flexible hourly bay rental system with various pricing tiers
On-site restaurant and bar for post-game food and drinks
Coaching and leagues available for skill improvement and competition

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with coal-fired pizza menu available for dine-in or online ordering
Full bar service available at the 34-seated bar area

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end radar-based launch monitor with drone-mapped course rendering

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available for $10 per session, but you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed, as the venue offers its own full-service restaurant and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time varies by group size and pace, but typically 18 holes can be completed in 2-3 hours depending on simulator availability and group size.

faq.question: Is Par28 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes children, with activities suitable for various age groups including golf, axe throwing, and dining.
